diffs.diff:
--- a/check_env3.py
+++ b/check_env3.py
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+import sys

+print('Executable:', sys.executable)

+print('Version:', sys.version)

+try:

+    import lerobot

+    print('lerobot OK:', lerobot.__file__)

+except Exception as e:

+    print('lerobot error:', e)

+try:

+    import h5py

+    print('h5py OK:', h5py.__file__)

+except Exception as e:

+    print('h5py error:', e)

+try:

+    import VLABench

+    print('VLABench OK:', VLABench.__file__)

+except Exception as e:

+    print('VLABench error:', e)
